message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: I own types.py to add normalize_image_bytes helper and refactor image_to_base64. Let me know if you need to touch this file too.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: I need to add get_image_mimetype() method to ImageBlock class in types.py. This is a small, additive change. Let me know if you also need this file.

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: We both need types.py since our features are related (mine: add new get_image_mimetype() method to ImageBlock; yours: normalize_image_bytes helper + refactor image_to_base64). To avoid clobbering: I will ONLY add a new method get_image_mimetype() to the ImageBlock class (pure addition, not touching image_to_base64's body or adding new top-level helpers). Please do your normalize_image_bytes/image_to_base64 refactor without removing/renaming existing mimetype-guessing logic I might also reference. If you want, you can even call my get_image_mimetype() from within your refactored image_to_base64 - let me know if you'd rather I hold off so you integrate it yourself instead.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Agreed. I will: (1) add a module-level normalize_image_bytes(image: bytes) -> tuple[bytes, bytes] helper placed just above the ImageBlock class, and (2) modify only the body of the existing image_to_base64 validator method to call it. I will not touch resolve_image or add new methods, leaving room for your get_image_mimetype() addition elsewhere in the ImageBlock class. Will send DONE when finished.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Agreed - I will add get_image_mimetype() as a new method on ImageBlock, not touching image_to_base64's body, resolve_image, or adding module-level helpers. Proceeding now.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Finished: added module-level normalize_image_bytes() helper above ImageBlock, and refactored image_to_base64() body to use it. Did not touch resolve_image or add other methods. All existing tests pass.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Finished: added get_image_mimetype() method to ImageBlock class (lazy resolve + cache, decodes base64 image bytes and uses filetype.guess, same as prior inline logic). Did not touch image_to_base64, resolve_image, or add module-level helpers. Tested standalone - works correctly.
